mapper.insert:
insert into user_word(user_id, word_id, status,appear_count) values
(#{userId},#{item.wordId},#{item.status},1)
on duplicate key update status = values(status),appear_count = appear_count+1
mapper.select: select uw.* from user_word uw inner join word w on uw.word_id = w.id where uw.user_id = #{userId} and w.book_id = #{bookId}
